description_long: This kiosk features a rectangular platform with a wood-textured floor and a prominent vertical back wall that serves as a display surface. The back wall is adorned with a large, colorful printed sign for 'CardioSUC 2022', including a heart graphic and event details, and is visually divided into a white upper section and a gradient lower section. At the front of the kiosk, there is a rectangular counter with a blue side and a white front, also branded with the event logo and text. The counter appears to have a flat top suitable for placing items or interacting with visitors. The structure is bordered by a blue trim at the base, providing a clean, modern look. There are no visible windows, doors, or roof overhangs, and the kiosk is open on three sides, making it accessible from the front and both sides.
description: A modern, open-front kiosk with a wood-textured floor, a large branded back wall, and a rectangular counter at the front, designed for event or promotional use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the branded back wall, the event logo, and the main counter with clear signage.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the counter and the open side access, with the blue side panel of the counter visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back of the kiosk's wall, with no signage or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open layout, the counter's white front, and the gradient back wall.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo, integrated into the back wall and front of the counter, with event name 'CardioSUC 2022', heart graphic, and slogan.
attribute_roof_design: Flat, open-top design with no visible roof structure.
